title: Glamorize 2pk 4 Step Advanced Creme Colour Light Blonde No. 3 – Long Lasting with Up to 100% Grey Coverage, No Bleach Permanent Hair Dye, Bright & Luminous Shade for Women

features: Radiant Blonde Shade – Discover refined colour with this light blonde hair dye permanent, designed to create a luminous, polished look while enhancing your natural style with chic sophistication.

Grey Coverage Root Hair Dye – Designed to blend regrowth effortlessly, this advanced crème system acts as a reliable hair dye for grey hair women, offering even tone and luminous results from root to tip.
Smooth Four-Step Application – Easy to apply in just four steps, this non-drip crème glides on for professional results at home. Perfect for all hair types, from sleek to textured, fine to thick.
Complete Application Kit – Each pack includes protective gloves, 40ml developer milk, and 40ml colour crème gel, ensuring a seamless, refined finish with light blonde hair dye results every time.

Chic Versatility – Designed as a light blonde hair dye set that suits a range of styles, from semi permanent hair dye blonde trials to hair dye light blonde permanent transformations, offering glamour and confidence.

Each pack contains 1 pair of protective gloves, 40ml developer milk, and 40ml colour crème gel. With two full sets included, you’ll have everything needed for complete applications or blonde root touch ups. Does this dye provide grey coverage? Yes, this light blonde hair dye permanent system is designed for up to 100% grey coverage. It blends regrowth seamlessly, giving you an even, luminous finish that looks polished and refined from roots to ends. How do I apply the colour at home? The advanced crème follows a four-step process: mix, apply, wait, and rinse. Its non-drip texture glides on smoothly, ensuring controlled application and chic, salon-inspired results without the stress of mess. Who is this blonde hair dye suitable for? Ideal as a permanent blonde hair dye for women, it suits all hair types from fine to thick. Whether you want a complete transformation, a blonde hair dye for dark hair, or subtle root touch ups, it adapts with ease. How long does the colour last? As a hair dye permanent blonde formula, it offers long-lasting vibrancy and shine. With proper care, the refined light blonde shade maintains its luminous finish until your next application or root refresh.
